topic.what: Operational ISO 27001:2022 ISMS implementation across 8 procedural areas in FinTech organisation
topic.how: Documents hierarchical procedural framework (policies → procedures → work instructions) and CIA Triad integration across risk assessment, access control, backup, and corrective action
topic.why_matters: FinTech sector faces heightened regulatory and commercial pressure; procedural ambiguity is top cause of ISMS nonconformities during audits

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of documented risk assessment workflow stages
characteristics.evidence: Section 4.3 enumerates all 12 steps from team formation to risk owner approval
characteristics.context: Hybrid quantitative-qualitative approach spanning asset valuation through residual risk calculation

characteristics.what_it_measures: Composite risk score granularity and scale
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 maps scores to 5 rating bands with management response timelines
characteristics.context: Composite R = f(Impact, Likelihood) where both use 5-point ordinal scale
Assets grouped into 6 categories evaluated against CIA dimensions

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of severe risks indicating unsatisfactory status
characteristics.evidence: Portfolio health: Strong <8%, Satisfactory 8-16%, Fair 16-25%, Marginal 25-30%, Unsatisfactory >30%
characteristics.context: Overall portfolio risk health indicator used for management oversight

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum acceptable data loss and downtime windows
characteristics.context: Subject to DR site availability, data volume, and infrastructure capacity; regulatory requirements may mandate tighter targets

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum time to close identified nonconformities
characteristics.context: Extensions require documented justification to CISO; exclusions require Top Management Dispensation Form

characteristics.what_it_measures: Longest retention period across asset categories
characteristics.context: Core databases: Daily 1 week / Monthly 1 year / Yearly 10 years; aligned with audit and regulatory obligations

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of Annex A controls in ISO 27001:2022
characteristics.context: 2022 revision restructured Annex A controls; motivates examination of procedural operationalisation
